title: antrophyum plicatum
intro: Antrophyum plicatum, also known as the plicate antrophyum fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Southeast Asia, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Antrophyum plicatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusions, and its leaves can also be used in herbal preparations like tinctures and poultices.
